Name: Time To Eat
Notes: Long-running Beaufort truck serving burgers cheesesteaks seafood fries and rotating specials; usually found around the Beaufort food truck court or local pop-ups.

Notes: American comfort truck that regularly pops up at Side Hustle Brewing Locals Only Taproom and other Bluffton-area spots.
